purpose: Convert body-map candidate triage into repeatable promotion lanes so Builder does not repair candidates one by one or mistake material for organs.

batch_policy.acceptance: passport draft + dedicated validator + proof; no active passport
batch_policy.current_strategy: use next ready candidate after accepted_atom calibration
